body.title: CLOSED: Wire escalate-as-default to NE empty-result path + build shared escalate primitive
body.result: escalate.py shared primitive + NE empty-result posts to channel with dedup; 5 tests pass
body.description:
Igor currently goes mute when NE produces no result — coa.py:202 `if result:` silently falls through with no channel post. scope_guard already escalates for HIGH-inertia writes; pe_chain escalates for no-description tickets. The remaining gap: NE empty-result path has no escalation. Design principle: escalate is the default fallback when nothing else will work (D-escalate-as-default-2026-05-10).

Fix: (1) In _ne_worker(), when `result` is falsy, post to channel: "[NE] cycle produced no result — nothing actionable in TWM. Igor may be stuck: {last_valence}". (2) Extract a shared `_escalate_to_channel(msg, dedup_key)` utility in a new `wild_igor/igor/cognition/escalate.py` module so all subsystems use the same primitive instead of copy-pasting _post_to_channel patterns.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py (NE empty-result block), wild_igor/igor/cognition/escalate.py (NEW — shared primitive)
**Design rules:** HIGH-inertia pre-approval required for coa.py. PRE-APPROVED by Akien: 'add it to the queue. get it all ticketed. audited. and now you have stuff to keep you busy for the next couple hours' (2026-05-10, D-escalate-as-default-2026-05-10).
**Scope boundary:** In scope: NE empty-result channel post; shared escalate.py primitive. Out of scope: migrating all existing escalation callers to use escalate.py (follow-on), watch list integration (T-igor-watch-list), scope_guard changes (already done).
**Test plan:** Test NE worker posts to channel when ne.run() returns None; test NE worker posts when ne.run() returns {}. Verify existing 4521+ tests still pass.
